campus: Rome (Faculty of Economics, Department of Economics and Law)
faculty: Economia (Economics), Department of Economics and Law (DIPECODIR)
admission_type: restricted access – verification of requirements and personal preparation
admission_test_type: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation (no standardized written test); possible interview
application_platform: MoveIN platform for non-EU pre-selection; Infostud for admission. Contact: healtheco.ecodir@uniroma1.it
places_and_foreign_contingent: [uncertain] – exact places and non-EU contingent not found in sources checked

academic_requirements.prior_degree: A three-year bachelor's degree or equivalent; background in economics, statistics, or related field expected
academic_requirements.curricular_requirements: [uncertain] – specific ECTS/SSD requirements not extracted from programme page; see programme regulations

country_specific_eligibility: [uncertain] – see MoveIN academic requirements PDF for 2026-2027

language_requirements.level: B2 CEFR in English (general Sapienza requirement; programme delivered entirely in English)
language_requirements.note: Programme is described as 'delivered entirely in English' by official faculty sources.

language_submission_timing: [uncertain] – at MoveIN pre-selection or at admission
italian_language_requirement: Italian not required for admission; programme fully in English.
application_deadline_eu: 31 July 2026 for EU and EU-equivalent candidates [uncertain – programme-internal deadline may differ]
application_deadline_non_eu: MoveIN pre-selection window 22 December 2025 – 15 May 2026 for non-EU candidates residing abroad
application_fee: €30 per application via MoveIN (max 2 per candidate per intake)
visa_preenrolment_deadline: MoveIN pre-selection by 15 May 2026; Universitaly pre-enrolment per national deadline
required_documents: Bachelor's degree certificate or enrolment certificate
For foreign qualifications: Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement, legalized/translated documents
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents require official translation and legalization/apostille, plus a Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA comparability statement.

entry_exam_or_test.selection: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation; interview may be required

test_score_conversion_or_threshold: [uncertain] – threshold not specified in sources checked
